worker_a.role: Worker A owns the domain model and service layer.
constraints: TaskService must have constructor TaskService(TaskStorage storage).
TaskService must use TaskStorage.loadTasks() and TaskStorage.saveTasks(List<Task> tasks).
TaskStorage.loadTasks() and saveTasks(...) throw IOException, so TaskService methods must handle or declare IOException.
TaskService must support createTask(String title), listTasks(), completeTask(int id).
Keep business logic out of Main.java and storage.

worker_b.role: Worker B owns storage, CLI integration, Maven config, and tests.
constraints: TaskStorage must expose exactly these public methods: List<Task> loadTasks() throws IOException and void saveTasks(List<Task> tasks) throws IOException.
Ensure constructor and method signatures match Worker A files exactly.
Tests must be runnable with mvn test.
